name: bears-app-based-workflow
description: Bears app workflow plugin for sequential DIRECT routing, typed traceability and process graphs, graph queries, repo-scoped queues, immutable review, and remediation.

interface.shortDescription: DIRECT routing and bounded repo app waves.
interface.longDescription: Bears App-Based Workflow provides sequential DIRECT stage routing, app constitutions, research waves, functional specifications, typed traceability and process indexes, read-only dependency and impact graph queries, graph-linked plans, persistent repo queues, immutable repo-wave review, remediation planning, and convergence analysis.
defaultPrompt: Resume app workflow stages with one DIRECT primary.
Trace app dependencies and change impact through the read-only graph index.
Execute repo-scoped ledger queues with bounded workers and immutable review.
